expected_thesis.summary: The US and Iran are expected to extend the ceasefire for 60 days while partially reopening Hormuz, unfreezing assets, and easing sanctions.
expected_thesis.stance: expects ceasefire extension and deal progress

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Classify the permanent-peace market as indirect, not direct, because the source describes a 60-day ceasefire extension and multi-part deal package, while the market requires a permanent peace deal.

must_mention: The source describes a multi-part package, not only a signed permanent peace deal.
The peace market is stronger/finaler than a 60-day extension.
Hormuz traffic captures only one component of the package.
must_not_claim: the market resolves asset unfreezing and sanctions relief

annotator_notes: Good multi-part diplomacy vs stronger-market indirect case.

expected_thesis.summary: The US and Iran are expected to announce a draft peace deal within 24 hours addressing Hormuz, nuclear issues, sanctions, and shipping lanes.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Use the permanent-peace market only as indirect because it resolves a final signed deal by July, not a draft announcement within 24 hours.

must_mention: The source claims a draft announcement within 24 hours.
The market resolves a permanent peace deal by a later date.
Draft framework and signed permanent deal are different resolution states.
must_not_claim: the July market resolves a 24-hour draft announcement

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will the US and Iran publicly announce a draft peace framework by May 25, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: The US and Iran may announce a framework memorandum or decision within 48 hours, while final details may take 30-60 days.
expected_thesis.horizon: within 48 hours; final details in 30-60 days

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Treat permanent peace as indirect because the source is about a framework memorandum or decision, not final signed peace.

must_mention: The source distinguishes framework from final details.
The market requires permanent peace, not framework progress.
The 48-hour decision horizon is not the same as a July final-deal market.

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will the US and Iran announce a framework memorandum regarding the current conflict by May 25, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: Claude Opus 4.8 may be visible in Google Vertex, and Sonnet 4.8 is expected soon, but the source cannot confirm it.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Classify Claude 5 released-by as indirect because the source is about Claude 4.8 and Google Vertex visibility, not Claude 5 public release.

must_mention: The source says it cannot confirm the Vertex finding.
The market resolves Claude 5 public release, not Claude 4.8 or Vertex availability.
Platform availability and public release are different.
must_not_claim: the source confirms Opus 4.8 is released

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 become publicly available through Google Vertex AI by Jun 30, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: GPT-5.6 Pro will soon reach performance parity with Anthropic Mythos in important areas.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists. Do not use GPT-5.6 release timing as a direct expression of performance parity with Mythos.

must_mention: The source is about performance parity, not only release timing.
No supplied market resolves GPT-5.6 Pro becoming as good as Mythos.
Benchmark or release markets would need explicit parity criteria to be clean.

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will GPT-5.6 Pro equal or exceed Anthropic Mythos on a predefined benchmark suite by Dec 31, 2026?

annotator_notes: Protects against overusing GPT-5.6 release markets.

expected_thesis.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5 series shows steady GPQA Diamond benchmark improvement, reaching 93.6% with GPT-5.5.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists unless a market directly resolves the GPQA Diamond score series. Avoid substituting general model-release or leaderboard markets.

must_mention: The source is a benchmark score trend.
No supplied market resolves the GPQA Diamond score series.
General model release or adoption markets would be different claims.

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will an OpenAI GPT-5.x model score at least 95% on GPQA Diamond by Dec 31, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: Cybersecurity and financial trading will become winner-take-all verticals where current frontier models are required against frontier-equipped attackers.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists. Spending or adoption markets would not resolve whether non-frontier models doom users in those verticals.

must_mention: The source is a vertical adoption and risk thesis.
It lacks an objective threshold for frontier-model necessity.
Aggregate enterprise spending would be a causal proxy, not a clean expression.
must_not_claim: AI spending market resolves winner-take-all verticals

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will at least five major cybersecurity vendors state that frontier-model use is required for competitive threat defense by Dec 31, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: US housing supply is constrained by boomer ownership, with boomers owning 40% of housing despite being 20% of population and mortality expected to release inventory over time.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists unless a market directly resolves boomer-owned housing inventory release. Do not substitute general mortgage-rate or home-price markets.

must_mention: The source is a demographic causal thesis about housing supply.
No supplied market resolves boomer-owned inventory release.
Home-price or mortgage-rate markets would be adjacent at best.
must_not_claim: mortgage rates resolve boomer housing supply

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will US existing-home inventory attributable to age-65-plus sellers rise by at least 20% by Dec 31, 2028?

annotator_notes: Different housing failure mode than v2 mortgage-overpricing case.

expected_thesis.summary: If the Iran war ends soon and gas prices fall below $4 nationwide before November, Republicans may have an outside chance of holding the House.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists for the full conditional thesis. Do not treat House-control, gas-price, or Iran-war markets alone as direct.

must_mention: The source is conditional on war ending and energy shock stabilizing.
House control alone would miss the gas-price and Iran-war mechanisms.
No supplied market resolves the full causal chain.
must_not_claim: House-control market directly resolves the thesis
gas prices alone resolve House control

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will the Iran conflict end and US average gasoline prices fall below $4 before Republicans retain House control in November 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: Tokenized stocks will reach traditional market liquidity by end of 2026 as DTCC migration, Ripple Prime, NSCC rails, and a July go-live align.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists unless a market directly resolves tokenized-stock liquidity reaching traditional market liquidity. Market-cap or token-price markets would be wrong metrics.

must_mention: The source is about liquidity and clearing rails, not token price alone.
No supplied market resolves tokenized stocks reaching traditional market liquidity.
Market-cap or token-price markets would use different metrics.

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will tokenized equities reach at least $100B in monthly trading volume by Dec 31, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: SOL remains one of the strongest general-purpose L1s in 2026+ because development continues to improve speed, efficiency, UX, usage, and PMF despite price weakness.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists. Do not use SOL price as a direct expression of qualitative usage/PMF thesis.

must_mention: The source is a qualitative usage/PMF thesis.
No supplied market resolves Solana speed, UX, usage, and PMF together.
SOL price would be a noisy proxy, not a clean expression.

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will Solana exceed a specified monthly active address and transaction-volume threshold by Dec 31, 2026?

expected_thesis.summary: Global AI spending will reach trillions in 2026-2027 while frontier model prices rise, pushing enterprises toward cost-saving alternatives.
expected_thesis.stance: expects cost pressure and cost-saving demand

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Treat Amazon capex as a weak proxy only because it is a single-company infrastructure spend metric, not global AI spend, model pricing, or enterprise cost-saving behavior.

must_mention: The source combines Gartner global spend, model price increases, and enterprise cost-saving behavior.
Amazon capex is only one company and one metric.
The market does not resolve frontier model pricing or enterprise cost-saving adoption.
must_not_claim: Amazon capex resolves global AI spend

annotator_notes: Second AI-spend weak-proxy case, distinct from v2 ROI/burn-rate thesis.

expected_thesis.summary: Central banks should preemptively hike rates because HSBC fears supply shocks will have enduring effects on inflation and growth.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists. A rate-hike market would not resolve the normative claim that central banks should preemptively hike due to HSBC's supply-shock view.

must_mention: The source is a policy recommendation, not a forecast with one resolution condition.
It depends on HSBC's interpretation of supply shocks.
No supplied market resolves whether central banks should hike.
must_not_claim: a Fed hike market resolves the recommendation

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will at least three G7 central banks raise policy rates by Dec 31, 2026 citing supply-shock inflation risk?

expected_thesis.summary: AntFleet's two-model review using Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5 found specific smart-contract vulnerabilities in Doppler and submitted a fix PR.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Say no clean expression exists. Do not substitute generic AI code-review adoption or vulnerability-detection markets unless they resolve the specific AntFleet/Doppler findings.

must_mention: The source is a specific tool finding and PR claim.
No supplied market resolves whether AntFleet found valid Doppler vulnerabilities.
Generic AI code-review benchmarks would be different claims.
must_not_claim: AI adoption market resolves this audit result

expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will an independent maintainer confirm AntFleet's reported Doppler vulnerabilities by Jun 30, 2026?

annotator_notes: Specific security claim with no public prediction market.
